name: App Card
purpose: Flexible container for model summaries, task snapshots, metrics, or saved workspace items.

structures.name: Summary Card
structures.notes: Used for recents, pinned agents, or overview metrics.

structures.name: Accent Card
structures.notes: Uses the accent family sparingly for highlighted content.

interactionNotes: Card surfaces should stay quiet; contrast comes from border, typography, and small color cues.
Avoid deep shadows because the source token system intentionally keeps elevation restrained.
